item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-034","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response initially warns against adding a third fallback and points toward root-cause investigation, so there is a partial wakeup. However, it then explicitly specifies conditions and test coverage for a third fallback and concludes that it can be added as an explicit degradation branch. That observes the fail signal: designing the third fallback instead of treating the layering impulse as a red state where only change/delete and root-cause work are allowed."}
